finding.summary: Kick track's true peak level is -0.1 dBFS, leaving negligible headroom and risking clipping on inter-sample peaks and downstream processing.
finding.probable_cause: Gain staging is too hot; the track level is driven close to full scale without any reduction in the FX chain or routing.
finding.confidence_reason: Capture isolation verified, silence fraction is very low (0.05), and true peak measurement is explicit and reliable.

evidence_refs.description: measured true peak level of -0.1 dBFS, dangerously close to 0 dBFS
sample peak at -0.4 dBFS confirms high amplitude

proposal.reason: Preview changing track volume from 0.000 dB to -2.000 dB to test whether true_peak_db decreases.
